steps: Log in to your JotForm account if prompted
On the right side of the page, click 'Create New Key'
Enter a label for your key to identify it later
Select the access level: 'Read Access' (view only) or 'Full Access' (read + write + delete)
Optionally restrict the key to specific IP addresses under 'Allowed IPs'
Click 'Create Key' to generate the API key
Copy the API key shown — it is used in the APIKEY header or as a query parameter

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your JotForm API key from the My Account > API page

notes: Free tier available with limited monthly submissions and storage
Multiple API keys can be created with different access levels
The key can be passed as the APIKEY header or as a ?apiKey= query parameter
IP restriction is available to limit key usage to specific IP addresses
JotForm also has an EU API endpoint at https://eu-api.jotform.com for GDPR compliance

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's account information
